base_url.description: Fully-qualified n8n public REST API base URL, including the /api/v1 version path (e.g. https://your-instance.n8n.cloud/api/v1).

api_key.description: n8n API key, sent as the X-N8N-API-KEY header. Never logged.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.

workflow_id.description: Workflow id used by workflow detail/version/tag streams and workflow write actions.

workflow_version_id.description: Workflow version id used by the workflow_version stream.

workflow_active.description: Optional active filter for the workflows list stream; use true or false.

workflow_tags.description: Optional comma-separated tag filter for the workflows list stream.

workflow_name.description: Optional workflow name filter for the workflows list stream.

exclude_pinned_data.description: Optional n8n excludePinnedData flag for workflow reads; use true or false.

execution_id.description: Execution id used by execution detail/tag streams and execution write actions.

execution_status.description: Optional status filter for the executions list stream.

include_execution_data.description: Optional includeData flag for execution reads; use true or false.

ignore_data_size_limit.description: Optional ignoreDataSizeLimit flag for execution reads; use true or false.

redact_execution_data.description: Optional redactExecutionData flag for execution reads; use true or false.

user_id.description: User id or email used by the user detail stream.

include_role.description: Optional includeRole flag for user reads; use true or false.

tag_id.description: Tag id used by the tag detail stream and tag write actions.

variable_id.description: Variable id used by variable write actions.

variable_state.description: Optional state filter for the variables list stream.

project_id.description: Project id used by project-scoped streams, filters, and project write actions.

project_user_id.description: User id used by project membership write actions.

data_table_id.description: Data table id used by data table detail, row, column, and write actions.

data_table_column_id.description: Data table column id used by column write actions.

data_table_filter.description: Optional encoded filter value for data table list/row reads.

data_table_sort_by.description: Optional sortBy value for data table list/row reads.

data_table_search.description: Optional search value for data table row reads.

credential_id.description: Credential id used by credential detail, test, and transfer actions.

credential_type_name.description: Credential type name used by the credential_schema stream.
